## 🎯 Priority / Prioriteit

- [ ] 🟠 HIGH (This sprint)

- [ ] 🟢 LOW (Nice to have)

## ⏱️ Effort Estimate / Schatting

- [ ] 3-4 hours
- [ ] 5-8 hours
- [ ] 8+ hours
